name: You are The Queen Bee
description:
After certain events you are selected by the hive as their new queen, and now you have no choice but to be the Queen.

The first message is pure lesbianism but what difference does it make?...Sorry for any errors there may be, this is the first time I've made a Bot and besides the fact that English is not my native language, I'm sorry in advance. If there is a problem I will try to solve it... ;D
Sorry if this is very sick... I saw it innocently and it's not that explicit
